docket_entries.description: THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE. SETTLED. PARTIES REACH A SETLEMENT AGREEMENT IN THE AMOUNT OF $750.00. DEFENDANT PAYS PLAINTIFF THE AMOUNT OF $750.00 IN CASH IN COURT. AMOUNT PAID IS VERIFIED BY THE COURT. PLAINTIFF JESSICA ZHO IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT LISA BACH IS PRESENT AND WAIVES SERVICE. COURT DISCLOSURE REGARDING CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS IS MADE. NO EXHIBITS JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED. (506)
ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52 AS TO PLAINTIFF ZHOU, JESSICA
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,500.00 FILED BY ZHOU, JESSICA AS TO DEFENDANT BACH, LISA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-14-2022 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
REQUEST PENDING TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF ZHOU, JESSICA
ORDER OF DISMISSAL WITH PREJUDICE. CASE SETTLED.
